{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030059F355DD088C3F6E9EA84C"}"},"total":98},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608845270471131966","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这篇小说最令人惊叹的，不是它身上那十七个标签，而是它真敢把这么多标签，一个个落到实处。
从1993年到201年，田浩彣用了十八年——准确的说是从9岁到16岁，因为他在时间里作弊了——把自己活成了一个行走的矛盾体：清华学生、著名作家、企业老总、音乐人、芯片投资人。这些身份放在别人身上是堆砌，放在他身上是必然。因为那条“游戏养芯片、支付建生态”的路径，不是暴发户的野心，是一个真正看懂时代的人，用七年时间一笔一笔画出来的蓝图。
而那个“非常弱的金手指”，其实是全书最诚实的地方。作者没有给主角开天眼，只是让他比别人多活了一遍。所有的音乐、文学、芯片、支付，都是他用那一遍的记忆，硬生生学出来的、做出来的、扛出来的。这不是爽文式的逆袭，这是把“重生”当成一次补考，认认真真重做一遍人生的卷子。
这不是一本能一目十行的小说。它要你慢下来，跟着那个少年，一步步走过音乐教室的午后、芯片实验室的深夜、支付系统的第一行代码，然后在一个普通的新闻日，和他一起抬头，看向那个藏在三星堆背后的宇宙。
但愿意慢下来的人，会在最后一页，听见自己脑子里那一声共振。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771575539,"group_id":"7594187713088080921","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"饶嵬，历史小说作者。曾任《昆明日报》记者、主编，资深媒体人。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N97o4ZbVH6n8GXVCUUuihDs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cb3c55bf23c8475c8461a6b05b007a00~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790094&x-signature=2Qu%2FyBREKkJb07%2BKA9qUwbqquws%3D","user_id":"111590665644","user_name":"春城山鬼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111590665644","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594187713088080921","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+学霸+商战+悬疑+探险+科幻+修仙+国运+真实+三星堆+上古文明】
【金手指非常弱，可归集为精神类疾病。仅依靠学习积累，实现自我突破】
【严谨的故事设定，合理的科学解释，真实的历史轨迹，探寻重生的奥义】
【没有无脑装逼打脸！阅读不能一目十行！但慢慢看懂会很爽！性急慎入】
2026年的失意中年田浩彣，重生穿越到1993年。
从9岁儿童到16岁少年，完成“重生觉醒—能力提升—业务奠基—生态布局—战略架构—精神整合”。
彻底摆脱先知依赖，建立起基于逻辑、价值与传承的独立人格；
在业务层面，音乐、文学、游戏、芯片、支付、教育多线并进；
在战略层面，形成了“游戏养芯片、支付建生态、社交连世界”的清晰蓝图。
16岁少年已完成清华学生、著名作家、企业老总、知名音乐人、芯片投资人等多重身份的叠加，拥有数亿个人资产，庞大的商业帝国。

但，在2001年2月9日的一则新闻：成都西郊建筑工发现金沙遗址，引发了颅内异常共振！
将一步步引领着少年用科学的手段，拓宽认知的边界、探寻远古的秘密、追索记忆的来源、追问重生的缘起、解答修仙的真相、探究宇宙的奥义。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc7de688a0945136ec46c650e9960999e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"口四文三","author_id":"","book_id":"7594187713088080921","book_name":"重生之认知边界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594187716586111513","read_count":"99","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"417919"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"129","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,重生,学霸,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc7de688a0945136ec46c650e9960999e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390059&x-signature=rg5pZ7YlMfTLwZloMREMpb%2B6ecA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109079506247","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030059F355DD088C3F6E9EA84C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8999,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10128,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":98},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1771591945,"author_reply_time":1771608661,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607450875339637529","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"除夕夜，窗外爆竹声声，我却捧着手机深陷《重生之认知边界》无法自拔。这部作品最令人称道之处，在于它对“重生”母题的去套路化处理——主角田浩摒弃先知依赖，以精神觉醒为起点，在音乐、芯片、支付等多维领域构建商业版图，完成了从“预知未来”到“创造未来”的认知跃迁。尤为惊艳的是，当故事由世俗逆袭转向金沙遗址引发的颅内共振，作品便从商战爽文升格为对宇宙奥义与修仙真相的哲学叩问。严谨的逻辑框架与宏大的叙事野心相得益彰，在这个辞旧迎新的夜晚，带来一场真正的思想盛宴。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771251532,"group_id":"7594187713088080921","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱好军事小说创作，也乐于探索各类穿越题材。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/1mSM5RXIJSIrG8KIOxXdk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"52137183720","user_name":"六剑传奇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52137183720","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594187713088080921","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+学霸+商战+悬疑+探险+科幻+修仙+国运+真实+三星堆+上古文明】

将一步步引领着少年用科学的手段，拓宽认知的边界、探寻远古的秘密、追索记忆的来源、追问重生的缘起、解答修仙的真相、探究宇宙的奥义。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc7de688a0945136ec46c650e9960999e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"口四文三","author_id":"","book_id":"7594187713088080921","book_name":"重生之认知边界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594187716586111513","read_count":"99","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"417919"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"129","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,重生,学霸,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc7de688a0945136ec46c650e9960999e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390059&x-signature=rg5pZ7YlMfTLwZloMREMpb%2B6ecA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109079506247","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030059F355DD088C3F6E9EA84C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5123,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5433,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":104},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1771253691,"author_reply_time":1771253732,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610028276023509822","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本非常硬核且爽感十足的都市脑洞小说！作者将“重生”、“商战”、“科幻”与“历史”元素完美融合，构建了一个逻辑严密且极具吸引力的世界观。主角田浩从2026年穿越回1993年，这种时间跨度本身就充满了戏剧张力。
最精彩的地方在于主角利用“先知”优势，在那个充满机遇的年代里大展拳脚。无论是商业上的精准布局，还是对历史走向的巧妙利用，都让人看得热血沸腾。书中不仅有商战的尔虞我诈，还穿插了对科学探索的思考，节奏紧凑，情节跌宕起伏，完全停不下来。这种既有深度又有爽点的作品，绝对是都市重生文里的佳作，强烈推荐！","text_exts":[{"e":243,"s":239,"text":"都市重生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742060596E9EA84C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610028276023509822%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227594187713088080921%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771849414,"group_id":"7594187713088080921","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N33jxekvQAgDLgi+hW49CzB1XKZ859JDrsg0ybwBWDue","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2218136200547178","user_name":"腾冲的道宇文皓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2218136200547178","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594187713088080921","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生+学霸+商战+悬疑+探险+科幻+修仙+国运+真实+三星堆+上古文明】
